1826680.name: Halberd Black
1826680.description: Halberd Black is an action-adventure JRPG set thousands of years into the future of our galaxy, where you play as a Stark, a genetically engineered human being caught in a struggle to survive and protect those he holds most dear from those who'd wish him harm. Explore the rich story of the Halberd Black universe and explore the beautiful landscapes, and dense city streets and enjoy combat reminiscent of the JRPGs of old ( With a Modern Twist ). Fight a wide variety of enemies using a dynamic turn-based combat system. Explore new environments as you seek strength to fight back against the powerful megacorporation that is after you and your friends. Only through grit and determination will you be able to fight against the threats that are coming your way. The only question is, do you have what it takes?
1826680.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
